hardenedRedeploy: 2026-07-14: full stack redeployed from the security-hardening pass (commits 30794bb, 5306308, 3e9fb72, a02184f — see SECURITY.md). Order per SECURITY.md: agent wasm upload → funding_router → rwa_vault → blend_strategy → wiring → registry. Live smoke on the new stack: 1-USDC deposit/redeem roundtrip (dead-shares inflation guard observed), relayed grant→pull→deposit (0 gas), registry authorize(agent) derived record, keeper compound idle-sweep into Blend (tx 4e993949395bbfae5b581ec7a87b0114388329d6bbbf6a021e2a29c24633b268), emergency_derisk under mandate (tx 00628504ea2694538266ca0261bf47ad1a086b59bf069377bcae2c900ed794c2, drained 20000999), resume (tx 3f2b808553d9f247cc1729fb207c0ca7c1bf7f0d991b6a54b79048082ae88c25), per-agent revoke + registry mirror, global allowance→0, owner_withdraw exit (shares burned, USDC swept to owner).
registryNote: Hardened redeploy 2026-07-14 (wasm 3ff21f39b28df887097fa14965243ffdfc6aa89dba7765f396d98cac7719940a, deploy tx 3fdfc5e7dcc30b0145a84d6106a5956e46f3441c1f1deac8b8782015f34245b0). NEW ABI: authorize(agent) derives the record from the agent contract's own scope_of() (owner/vault/token/cap/expiry) — the caller supplies nothing but the address; scope.owner.require_auth() gates it. revoke(owner, agent) stays a metadata mirror; AgentAccount.revoke() is the enforcing kill switch. Legacy registry (pre-hardening, old owner-supplied authorize ABI): CAEHOZGUGVNRCAFVJCSR3B2EFJ55LEA34S76HTRQGH7XSPBO7YIMNZOQ.
agentAccountWasmHashNote: v3 (hardened, upload tx d52f0ba0f5598b1ccf6d0036c152072f4b4cb23449f6af0e9d733850ff59b63f) — on-chain enforced revoke, owner_withdraw terminal exit, scope_of() for the registry's derived records. Pinned by fundingRouter below; frontend SOROBAN_AGENT_WASM_HASH must equal this. Legacy hashes: v1 8c607112ba93ff289d30f2c894ca586c745328e5cb2ae6139917c6df540dda62 (pre-seeded demo agent), v2 7ced45e735e7e084d96d6a04df7cec6e07bc2b203eedb4d3422949a7e9cca717 (first one-popup factory).
demoAgentNote: LEGACY as of 2026-07-14: this pre-seeded agent runs the v1 wasm and its constructor-only scope pins the RETIRED autofarm vault (CB5VKYDU…JDYU) — deposits from it do NOT reach the live vault. Kept for explorer/history only; product flows use per-run agents deployed by the funding router (grant path).

fundingRouter.note: One-popup grant factory + funding gate (zero custody), hardened: no admin/upgrade path, only factory-deployed agents can pull (and only from their recorded owner), owner-bound deployment salts. Constructor pins (agent wasm v3 hash d61ceaaa…a2ba, token). owner.grant() is the single wallet popup (covers the nested SEP-41 token.approve + deploys the run's agents via the pinned wasm); relayed router.pull() funds each agent within the token allowance — the router never holds funds. The server relay guard's SOROBAN_ROUTER_ADDRESS env must equal address or grant/pull fee-bumps are refused. Deployer: vf-deployer (GCIOUP4U…RYHNS). Legacy router (pre-hardening): CBEI5VJKKWLXKQUUUETBAPZSQQLH7I57TSIDTMV4WJMBKIGVF7NSNOFY.

exitRouter.note: The exit-side mirror of fundingRouter.grant: `sweep(owner, agents, to)` batches one `agent_account.owner_withdraw` per agent into the ONE host-function invocation a Soroban tx allows, so exiting N agents costs ONE wallet signature instead of N. The owner's require_auth here and inside every agent are all the tx source, so source-account credentials cover the whole tree on one envelope signature (same mechanism as grant covering its nested token.approve). Stateless, no admin, no upgrade, zero custody — it grants NO authority: each agent still checks its own stored owner, so naming an agent you do not own sweeps nothing. Per-agent try_ calls: a revoked/empty agent reports 0 and its neighbours still sweep; a sweep that moves nothing errors (NothingSwept) rather than returning an empty success. Deployer: relayer GBVJ34MT…LV3X (irrelevant — the contract has no privileged role). Unset VITE_SOROBAN_EXIT_ROUTER_ADDRESS to roll back to the per-agent N-signature loop.

vault.note: PRE-autofarm vault (dividend-model wasm, predates add_strategy/set_keeper/compound/rebalance). Kept for history/rollback — superseded by `autofarmVault` below.

autofarmVault.renameNote: 2026-07-17: source crate renamed rwa_vault -> autofarm_vault (legacy name from the cancelled RWA-Fi pivot). This deployed instance is unchanged — the wasmHash above was built while the crate was still named rwa_vault. No redeploy.
autofarmVault.name: Vibing Farmer Autofarm
autofarmVault.mandateAuthorityNote: 2026-07-16: moved from vf-deployer to the demo user's wallet on THIS vault (tx 75964038baea72e310600fd31189a5bff65b932deaaefed73e06e5593b761d95, verified via lifeboat_state) so in-app 'Renew 24h mandate' signs with the connected wallet, per the set_mandate_authority design comment in vault.rs. The earlier 2026-07-15 attempt (tx f472ef716c055ba8a391cefb77d829972e2310daf09f1b956baf20fad2005ff1) succeeded but targeted the RETIRED vault CB5VKYDU…JDYU, so the live vault stayed on vf-deployer until now.
autofarmVault.keeperNote: Dedicated keeper identity (split from the relayer). Secret lives ONLY in frontend/.env.local STELLAR_KEEPER_SECRET (local) / wrangler secret (deployed keeper).
autofarmVault.note: Hardened redeploy 2026-07-14 (fresh instance, NOT an in-place upgrade — the pre-hardening vault CB5VKYDUIYX3RZWGVLKKNBPG7V7Z5JIHF2QPNQKWKAHVA3IPSLFZJDYU is retired). Hardening live-verified: dead-shares inflation guard on first deposit, observed-token-delta accounting, faulty-strategy isolation (try_-calls + quarantine), live NAV from Blend pool books, finite crisis withdrawals. Lifeboat drill on THIS instance: compound idle-sweep tx 4e993949…3b268, derisk tx 00628504…94c2 (drained_total 20000999), resume tx 3f2b8085…8c25. Single-strategy: a self-deployed second Blend pool can't reach Active status without seeding real backstop capital, so this vault runs strategy1 only and relies on the de-risk-to-idle path.

strategy1.note: Hardened blend_strategy: NAV read live from the pool's books (not cached bToken math), finite crisis withdrawals (i128::MAX-clamped), BLND sweep after full drain. Legacy strategy (pre-hardening, wired to the retired vault): CCH424TVLTP2P3URNRGGF26X24XRPBVBXCRZ6QBCWLSX6KH4QZSLNBC2.

smartAccount.source: reused live bindings-0.1.2 demo-env testnet artifacts (not self-deployed); v0.7.2 tag drifted to get_context_rules_count and does NOT match bindings 0.1.2
